title: Security Risk Triage
description: Classify a change by asset, actor, trust boundary, sink, data sensitivity, and required human gate.
body: Inputs: changed files, user request, repo signals, and any test or scanner output. Use when deciding whether security, privacy, production, or supply-chain constraints should block automation. Do not use to provide exploit instructions or to approve policy relaxation. Procedure: list protected assets, identify who can influence the input, identify the enforcement point, name dangerous sinks, mark secret or personal data exposure, and decide whether a human gate is required. Output: risk class, required checks, denied shortcuts, and residual risk. Validation signals include specific file or route evidence and a conservative gate when evidence is incomplete.
